$schema: Eval set for skill testing. Copy this template when creating evals for a new skill.

evals.prompt: Realistic user request that should trigger this skill
evals.expected_output: Description of what correct output looks like

assertions.name: assertion_name
assertions.description: Human-readable description of what's being checked
assertions.value: string that must appear in output

trigger_evals.query: User request that SHOULD trigger this skill
User request that should NOT trigger this skill (near-miss)
